name: azure-devops-doc-client
description: Generated Azure DevOps 7.1 API client built from local documentation inventories.

scripts.catalog:inventory: node scripts/inventory-pdf.mjs "rest-api-azure-devops-azure-devops-rest-7.1.pdf" "tmp/rest-inventory.json" services && node scripts/inventory-pdf.mjs "rest-api-azure-devops-azure-devops-server-rest-7.1.pdf" "tmp/server-inventory.json" server
scripts.catalog:refresh: npm run catalog:inventory && npm run catalog:generate
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build

author: Azure DevOps Doc Client Contributors
